title: Create: Craftsmanship
description: A Create modpack designed around: performance, simplicity and multiplayer!
body:
![Discord logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85a115342b8d4223d44a8f5a112a81eb90f089dc.png)[Discord](https://discord.gg/jy9YDuHNa2)

**General**

This Modpack is here for everybody who wants a simple Create mod experience in a big world alone or with friends with high FPS!!!

**Offcial Trailer coming soon!!!**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/iQndNIVlzMg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Features**

- Create: This Modpack includes the incredible Create Mod which enables the Player to Build Factories to automate everyday Tasks.
- Create Addons: Enjoy a few of the best Create Addons like Steam n Rails adding more train tracks and train themed blocks, Copycats + adding more copycats making building easier and more incredible Addons 
- Tectonic + Continents: Enjoy incredible Vanilla Style World Generation with giant mountains and deep caves whilst the whole workd is split into Continents with big oceans between them.
- Lootr: This Mod makes the multiplayer experience even better with each player having being able to loot the same chest.
- Numismatics: Add an economy to the game and build shops which cant be robbed (not guaranteed)
- Distant Horizons: See far and wide without setting your house on fire with the incredible Distant Horizons Mod (now with multiplayer Support)



**Q&A**

- Q: Is this Modpack multiplayer compatible?

 A: Yes this modpack is designed for Multiplayer but also supports Singelplayer.

- Q: How do i make somebody start with Money?

 A: Use the /numismatics add command to give a player cash into their account, we recomend giving 3 Suns to each player, /numismatics add (playername) 3 SUN.

- Q: Can i modify the modpack?

 A: Yes but adding/removing mods may cause unexpected issues but we are happy to help and take suggestions on our Discord!

- Q: I have found a bug what now?

 A: Report it on our discord and we will work on resolving it!

- Q: My question did not get awnsered here where can i ask it?

 A: Feel free to ask any questions in our discord.

<details>
<summary>Updates</summary>

This modpack will for the time being remain on Fabric 1.20.1 and will update to 1.21 when all mods have been ported. New Mods will be added every few weeks/month depending on demand.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Support</summary>

For help join our discord or check the GitHub of the mod in question.

</details>

**Thanks for Downloading this Modpack! And please enjoy Building, Exploring and Crafting in your incredible World!**
